concept: Imagine a fighting game where characters don't directly damage each other but instead manipulate the environment to push opponents into hazards. Combat arenas feature destructible elements, movable objects, and triggered traps that become the primary means of securing victory. Fighter movesets focus on environmental interaction, object control, and positional advantage rather than direct attack combos. Match dynamics evolve as the arena gradually breaks down, revealing new hazards and eliminating previously safe positions. The tournament is held in an ancient colosseum with allegedly sentient architecture that reconfigures itself between matches to test different aspects of combatants' abilities.
